name: First Aid Kit — SJF M5 (School / Institution / Bus, Mini)
shortDescription: 4-compartment metal cabinet first aid kit for schools, institutions and buses, up to 5 persons.
longDescription: A metal cabinet kit purpose-built for schools, institutions and bus operators, with a breathing mask, instant cold compress and wooden splint alongside the standard wound-care range. Four labelled compartments keep supplies organised for a non-medical first responder.

images.alt: First Aid Kit — SJF M5 (School / Institution / Bus, Mini) supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Contents
specs.value: Compartment 1 — First Aid Guide x1, Antiseptic Cream 10g x1, Adhesive Plaster 19x72mm x5, 25x72mm x3, Round x2, Square x2, Knuckle x2, Wound Cleaning Wipes (ALC) x3, Antiseptic Wipes x3, Sterile Gauze Swab 7.5cm x2, 5cm x2, Microporous Tape 1.25x5m x1. Compartment 2 — Sterile Gauze Swab 10cm x2, Sterile Burn Dressing 5cm x1, 10cm x1, Sterile Dressing Small x1, Gauze Bandage 5cm x3mtr x1, Dusting Powder 10g x1, Absorbent Cotton 15gms x1, Sterile Eye Pad Oval x2. Compartment 3 — Triangular Bandage x1, Gauze Bandage 7.5cm x3mtr x1, Wooden Splint x1, Easy-Use Tourniquet x1, Instant Cold Compress x1, Breathing Mask x1, Examination Gloves x2, Scissor Small x1, Tweezer (Plastic) x1. Compartment 4 — Electrolyte Powder 4.5g x2, Antiseptic Lotion 50ml x1, Pain Cream 10gms x1, Burn Cream 15gm x1, Paracetamol Tablet 500mg x10, Aspirin Tablet 75mg x14, Tincture Iodine 20ml x1, Covers for Amputated Parts x1
